prompt: The loop counts one too many iterations. What is the bug?
choices: count must be initialized to -1 instead of 0
The loop condition i <= arr.length includes arr[arr.length] which is out of bounds, throwing ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException
for-each should be used instead of index-based iteration
arr[i] > 0 should be arr[i] >= 0 to count non-negative values
explanation: Valid indices are 0 to arr.length-1. i <= arr.length allows i = arr.length (e.g., i=3 for length 3), causing ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fix: i < arr.length.
